'''Sorn''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served the [[Empire of the Hand]]. Sorn scouted the [[Sartinaynian system|Bastion system]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] for signs of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Flim (Human)|Flim]], who was posing as the Chiss Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
